title: 阪神JFの後に・可能性、抱いて

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I can feel the wind embracing me, and the world
looks so... beautiful.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I... I did it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (So this is what it feels like to finish a G1!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I did it... I ran in a G1!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(This means I can actually take on the Triple
Tiara!)

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I found myself absolutely mesmerized by your
every stride! Nice going!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Pearl...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Getting to compete against you has made me,
well... more confident in myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Oooh! My heart!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Only fate knows if our paths will ever cross again,
but... at least let me say this.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Limitless potential lights our path forward!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Mejiro Dober. I'll see you again
someday.

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Mejiro Dober is so cool!

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Did we just witness the birth of a new Mejiro
star?! I'll have to keep my eye on her during the
Tiara tour!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I wouldn't expect anything less from Dober.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober comes back wearing a very satisfied
expression, the crowd still cheering loudly in her
wake.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What are you surprised about? I told you I wanted to do well today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I did say I wanted to do well... and I guess I wasn't
all talk.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... I think I'm ready to take on the next
race.
choice_data_list: You mean the Oka Sho? Yeah, let's win it.
You mean the Oka Sho? Yeah, let's win it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... I think I'm ready to take on the next
race.
choice_data_list: You mean the Oka Sho? Yeah, let's win it.
You mean the Oka Sho? Yeah, let's win it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
As if there's any other option. I have to win and
keep my promise with Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Right. I have to keep my promise with Bright,
which means I've got to win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And in order for me to do that, well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And I'll be counting on your help, so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'll see you tomorrow. For training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Let's get back to training tomorrow, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems this race has given her the tangible
results she needed going into the Triple Tiara
tour!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems this race has given her the tangible
results she needed going into the Triple Tiara
tour!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next challenge is going to be a Classic
race—the Oka Sho!
